summary: Plan-only PR remediation inventory. All five listed PRs are open, non-security, and independently useful or potentially useful, but none has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation. Closure and comments are blocked by job frontmatter, and the candidates span unrelated docs, config/runtime, i18n, Docker, and doctor diagnostics work, so no single cluster-scoped executable fix artifact is safe.

actions.reason: Useful standalone docs candidate, but not merge-ready and not part of a safe cluster-wide repair artifact.
Standalone feature/config/runtime PR with unresolved behavior proof and review findings; keep it open outside this inventory decision.
Narrow standalone i18n glossary PR, but currently blocked by parseability/proof/rebase evidence.
Useful but broad Docker/operator-helper PR; keep as independent rather than merge or cluster-repair from this plan.
Diagnostic slice related to open canonical issue #62328, but not a full fix and not merge-ready.
